mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, symbol, symbol_type, symbol_name, alert_date, time_point, change_percent, current_price, yesterday_close, is_read, triggered_at, created_at, updated_at, status, max_change_percent, min_change_percent, latest_detail_id, alert_type FROM risk_alert WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, symbol, symbol_type, symbol_name, alert_date, time_point, change_percent, current_price, yesterday_close, is_read, triggered_at, created_at, updated_at, status, max_change_percent, min_change_percent, latest_detail_id, alert_type FROM risk_alert WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND triggered_at::date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY triggered_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM risk_alert WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = false
mapper.update: UPDATE risk_alert SET is_read = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = false
